SEARCH
Package com.group02.tars.service

Interface MoService

All Known Implementing Classes:
MoServiceImpl
public interface MoService
Service contract for module-organizer job and applicant workflows.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Job
    createJob(String moUserId, String title, String moduleName, String requiredSkills, String deadline, String description, String status, String weeklyHours)
    Creates a job owned by a module organizer.
    Map<String,Object>
    dashboard(String moUserId)
    Builds dashboard data for a module organizer.
    List<Map<String,Object>>
    listApplicants(String moUserId, String jobId, String status, String keyword)
    Lists applicants for jobs owned by a module organizer.
    List<Map<String,Object>>
    listJobs(String moUserId, String status, String keyword)
    Lists jobs owned by a module organizer.
    Map<String,Object>
    reviewApplication(String moUserId, String applicationId)
    Returns review detail for one application owned by a module organizer.
    Application
    updateApplicationStatus(String moUserId, String applicationId, String status, String reviewNote)
    Updates the review status for an owned application.
    Job
    updateJob(String moUserId, String jobId, String title, String moduleName, String requiredSkills, String deadline, String description, String status, String weeklyHours)
    Updates a job owned by a module organizer.

  • Method Details

    • dashboard

      Map<String,Object> dashboard(String moUserId) throws IOException
      Builds dashboard data for a module organizer.
      Parameters:
      moUserId - module organizer user id
      Returns:
      dashboard metrics and near-deadline jobs
      Throws:
      IOException - if stored data cannot be read

    • listJobs

      List<Map<String,Object>> listJobs(String moUserId, String status, String keyword) throws IOException
      Lists jobs owned by a module organizer.
      Parameters:
      moUserId - module organizer user id
      status - optional job status filter
      keyword - optional title or module keyword
      Returns:
      owned job rows with applicant counts
      Throws:
      IOException - if stored data cannot be read

    • createJob

      Job createJob(String moUserId, String title, String moduleName, String requiredSkills, String deadline, String description, String status, String weeklyHours) throws IOException, ServiceException
      Creates a job owned by a module organizer.
      Parameters:
      moUserId - module organizer user id
      title - job title
      moduleName - module name or code
      requiredSkills - required skill text
      deadline - deadline in YYYY-MM-DD form
      description - job description
      status - requested status
      weeklyHours - requested weekly hours
      Returns:
      created job
      Throws:
      IOException - if stored job data cannot be read or written
      ServiceException - if validation fails

    • updateJob

      Job updateJob(String moUserId, String jobId, String title, String moduleName, String requiredSkills, String deadline, String description, String status, String weeklyHours) throws IOException, ServiceException
      Updates a job owned by a module organizer.
      Parameters:
      moUserId - module organizer user id
      jobId - job id to update
      title - optional replacement title
      moduleName - optional replacement module name
      requiredSkills - optional replacement required skills
      deadline - optional replacement deadline
      description - optional replacement description
      status - optional replacement status
      weeklyHours - optional replacement weekly hours
      Returns:
      updated job
      Throws:
      IOException - if stored job data cannot be read or written
      ServiceException - if the job is missing, forbidden, or invalid

    • listApplicants

      List<Map<String,Object>> listApplicants(String moUserId, String jobId, String status, String keyword) throws IOException, ServiceException
      Lists applicants for jobs owned by a module organizer.
      Parameters:
      moUserId - module organizer user id
      jobId - optional owned job id filter
      status - optional application status filter
      keyword - optional applicant, title, or module keyword
      Returns:
      applicant rows joined with job and user data
      Throws:
      IOException - if stored data cannot be read
      ServiceException - if the requested job is not owned by the organizer

    • reviewApplication

      Map<String,Object> reviewApplication(String moUserId, String applicationId) throws IOException, ServiceException
      Returns review detail for one application owned by a module organizer.
      Parameters:
      moUserId - module organizer user id
      applicationId - application id to review
      Returns:
      application review detail row
      Throws:
      IOException - if stored data cannot be read
      ServiceException - if the application or owned job cannot be resolved

    • updateApplicationStatus

      Application updateApplicationStatus(String moUserId, String applicationId, String status, String reviewNote) throws IOException, ServiceException
      Updates the review status for an owned application.
      Parameters:
      moUserId - module organizer user id
      applicationId - application id to update
      status - next status, expected to be selected or rejected
      reviewNote - note stored with the review decision
      Returns:
      updated application
      Throws:
      IOException - if stored application data cannot be read or written
      ServiceException - if validation, ownership, or workload checks fail
